posts.text: The quiet moments are often the most important. Last night just before Cabinet members walked onto the House floor for the President’s State of the Union, we joined together in prayer, giving all thanks and praise to God, and praying for the clarity and strength to listen to Him, serve Him, and do His will.

CNN: 64% of speech watchers say President Trump's polices will move the country in the right direction 🔥

Video

PASS THE SAVE AMERICA ACT — NOW!

Video

CONGRATULATIONS to the U.S. Men’s and Women’s Gold Medal-Winning Hockey Teams!

Under @POTUS, America is WINNING LIKE NEVER BEFORE 🇺🇸

For glory. For love of country.

Video

Megan Hemhauser is a bartender, waits tables at night, & homeschools her two children. Her husband works 10 to 15 hrs of overtime per week operating heavy equipment. 

Her family will receive more than $5,000 extra per year thanks to the Working Families Tax Cuts. 🇺🇸

If you were moved by @DalilahColeman's story tonight during the #SOTU, you can help her family pay for her extensive care and medical bills by contributing to her GoFundMe here: 

gofundme.com/f/stand-with-da…
Happy birthday to my one and only  ❤️ Over and over again, I do.
USA!!!!! Amazing victories by America’s  men and women hockey teams!! Incredible!!!      🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸

I knew Jesse Jackson to be a kind man and a dear friend who never hesitated to call me with an encouraging word, prayers and advice with messages that often centered around, “Stay strong.  Don’t back down.  Pray and take shelter in God. Do the right thing for the country.” To the Jackson family, may the warmth of God’s unconditional love surround you all.
A day late, but yesterday was for us ❤️ You are my forever valentine. I love you with all my heart!

This isn't a revision

This is a complete course correction

Your story was false, & @DNIGabbard did nothing wrong

It is not a coincidence that these attacks have ramped up since the administration tasked her with securing our elections

DNI Gabbard is directly over the target



Cate Brown (@catebrown12)

Protecting the security of our elections is absolutely critical, and @DNIGabbard being part of this effort, should reassure everyone. @CivilRights is proud to be part of this effort!

Senator Mark Warner and his friends in the Propaganda Media have repeatedly lied to the American people that I or the ODNI “hid” a whistleblower complaint in a safe for eight months. This is a blatant lie. 

The truth:

- I am not now, nor have I ever been, in possession or control of the Whistleblower’s complaint, so I obviously could not have “hidden” it in a safe. Biden-era IC Inspector General Tamara Johnson was in possession of and responsible for securing the complaint for months.

"The real story is not the “scoop” or the supposed scandal. It is the relentless recycling of the same weaponized secrecy playbook and the media’s grotesque complicity each time, deployed to suppress anyone pursuing real accountability. Gabbard’s work cuts through that pattern, and the intensity of the backlash against her only underscores the point." thefederalist.com/2026/02/05…
